title: Flowise AirtableAgent executes unvalidated LLM-generated Python in Pyodide, enabling prompt-injection RCE
description: In the run() method of packages/components/nodes/agents/AirtableAgent/AirtableAgent.ts, the user-supplied question (the run() `input` parameter, only optionally passed through input moderation) is interpolated directly into the LLMChain prompt template as `{question}` (the systemPrompt in core.ts). The chain's text output is stored in `pythonCode`, stripped of markdown fences, and then executed verbatim via `pyodide.runPythonAsync(`import pandas as pd\n${pythonCode}`)` with no syntactic or semantic validation of the generated code. Because the prompt is fully attacker-influenced, a prompt-injection payload can make the LLM emit arbitrary Python (e.g. `df.query('@__builtins__.__import__("os").system(...)')`), which is then run in the Pyodide sandbox, yielding remote code execution.
